info.name: Banana Transport — Data Import API
info.description:
CSV-based historical data import for Banana Transport.

## Import Order (MUST follow this sequence)
1. `POST /api/import/master-data?type=agents`
2. `POST /api/import/master-data?type=companies`
3. `POST /api/import/master-data?type=generations`
4. `POST /api/import/master-data?type=vehicles`
5. `POST /api/import/master-data?type=users`
6. `POST /api/import/enquiries`

## How to use
- All requests use `multipart/form-data`
- Attach your CSV file using the field name **`file`**
- All routes require Admin token in `Authorization: Bearer {{adminToken}}`
- Sample CSV files are in the `/sample-import-data/` folder of the project

## Duplicate Handling
- Master data: if unique key (mobile/name/plate) already exists → **skipped** (no error)
- Enquiries: if same `farmerMobile` + `scheduledDate` already exists → **skipped**

## Default Password for Imported Users
All users imported via the users CSV get the default password: `Welcome@123`

variable.description: Paste your Admin JWT token here after login

formdata.description: Upload agents.csv from the sample-import-data/ folder

query.description: Import type — agents | companies | generations | vehicles | users

request.description:
Imports agents from CSV. Skips rows where `mobileNo` already exists.

**CSV Columns:** `agentName`, `mobileNo`, `contactPerson`, `location`, `notes`

**Required:** agentName, mobileNo, contactPerson, location

**Sample file:** `sample-import-data/agents.csv`

Imports buying companies. Skips rows where `companyName` already exists (case-insensitive).

**CSV Columns:** `companyName`, `legalName`, `taxId`, `headquarters`, `procurementNotes`

**Required:** companyName, headquarters

**Sample file:** `sample-import-data/companies.csv`

Imports banana generation/variety types (G9, F1, Robusta etc). Skips if name already exists.

**CSV Columns:** `name`, `description`

**Required:** name

**Sample file:** `sample-import-data/generations.csv`

Imports vehicle fleet. Skips if `vehicleNumber` already exists.

**CSV Columns:** `vehicleNumber`, `vehicleType`

**Required:** Both columns

**vehicleType must be exactly:** `Eicher` or `Pickup`

**Sample file:** `sample-import-data/vehicles.csv`

Imports staff/users and creates login accounts. Skips if `mobileNo` already exists.

**Default password for all imported users:** `Welcome@123` (hashed automatically)

**CSV Columns:** `firstName`, `lastName`, `mobileNo`, `role`, `email`

**Required:** firstName, lastName, mobileNo, role

**Valid roles:** `Admin`, `Field Owner`, `Field Selector`, `Operational Manager`, `Munshi`, `driver eicher`, `driver pickup`

**Sample file:** `sample-import-data/users.csv`

formdata.description: Upload enquiries.csv from the sample-import-data/ folder

request.description:
Imports historical farmer enquiry records. **Must run AFTER all master data is imported.**

## How String Matching Works
The CSV uses plain text names — the backend auto-resolves them to MongoDB ObjectIds:
- `generation` → matched by exact name (case-insensitive) in Generation collection
- `agentName` → matched by exact name (case-insensitive) in Agent collection
- `companyName` → matched by exact name (case-insensitive) in Company collection
- `fieldOwnerMobile` → matched by mobile number in User collection
- `fieldSelectorMobile` → matched by mobile number in User collection

## Required Columns
`farmerFirstName`, `farmerLastName`, `farmerMobile`, `location`, `plantCount`, `generation`, `status`, `fieldOwnerMobile`

## Optional Columns
`subLocation`, `agentName`, `visitPriority`, `purchaseRate`, `packingType`, `estimatedBoxes`, `companyName`, `scheduledDate`, `remarks`, `fieldSelectorMobile`

## Valid status values
`COMPLETED`, `REJECTED`, `CANCELLED`, `PENDING`, `SELECTED`, `RATE_FIXED`, `IN_PROGRESS`

## Duplicate Check
Skips if same `farmerMobile` + `scheduledDate` already exists in DB

## Historical records
`editableUntil` is set to `null` — these records are permanently locked from editing

**Sample file:** `sample-import-data/enquiries.csv`
